iterate_latest.summary: Bug: the Campaigns lane (FR-01.33) kept rendering a 100%-done campaign card forever when the producer never flipped its lifecycle from `active` to `complete` (e.g. driven via individual sub-iterate PRs instead of the autonomous loop's update-status call). Root cause: selectActiveCampaigns short-circuited status==='active' to shown WITHOUT checking done===total. Fix: new isCampaignDone(c) helper (complete lifecycle OR total>0 && done>=total) checked BEFORE the active short-circuit, so a stale-active done==total campaign is hidden from the default lane. No server change (done/total/status already computed server-side).

server.reason: client-only diff (no server/** file touched); selectActiveCampaigns is a client selector

unit.evidence: full client vitest 147/1550 green; campaignsApi.test.ts 26/26 (RED 5 failures on old code → GREEN); tsc --noEmit clean; oxlint clean on changed files

integration.reason: pure client selector; no integration boundary

e2e.reason: Authored the active-done HIDDEN regression assertion in campaign-status-filter.spec.ts (the FR-01.33 lane-filter E2E). NOT executed this run — see surface_verification.justification: pure client selector, no transport/render-path change, and that spec's isolated-stack campaign seeder is not committed/reusable. The assertion runs in the next seeded full-E2E/CI pass.

surface_verification.justification: Pure client-side selector (selectActiveCampaigns/isCampaignDone) — no API route, store mutation, SSE/WS handler, or message contract changed, so Backend-affects-Frontend does not apply. Root-cause seam covered RED->GREEN by deterministic unit tests; the sole consumer (TaskBoardPage selectActiveCampaigns(data).length>0 && map) is unchanged and its render path was already browser-proven by the existing (unaffected) campaign-status-filter E2E, which this diff extends with the active-done HIDDEN assertion. Reconstructing that spec's non-committed isolated-stack seeder to re-prove an unchanged render path is disproportionate to a ~10-line predicate refinement.

behaviors.behavior: FIX: an `active` campaign at done==total is excluded from the lane (was shown by the old `active` short-circuit — the 2026-06-05 bug)
behaviors.evidence: campaignsApi.test.ts 'hides an active campaign whose every step is done' + 'user repro: a 4/4 active campaign + a 0/7 draft → the lane is empty' (both RED on old code, GREEN after)

behaviors.behavior: isCampaignDone(status='complete') === true even when done<total (producer lifecycle is authoritative)
behaviors.evidence: campaignsApi.test.ts 'is done when the producer marked it complete'
campaignsApi.test.ts 'is done when every step is finished, regardless of a stale active lifecycle' (active@3/3, null@3/3)
campaignsApi.test.ts 'is NOT done with work remaining or no steps yet' (active@2/3, active@0/0, draft)

behaviors.behavior: REGRESSION: selectActiveCampaigns still SHOWS an active campaign with work remaining (done<total)
behaviors.evidence: campaignsApi.test.ts 'still shows an active campaign with work remaining' + existing 'active is shown even when nothing is done yet'

behaviors.behavior: REGRESSION: selectActiveCampaigns still SHOWS a freshly-started active campaign with no steps yet (total=0)
behaviors.evidence: campaignsApi.test.ts 'shows a freshly-started active campaign that has no steps yet'

behaviors.behavior: PRESERVED: draft hidden, complete hidden, legacy(null) done<total shown, legacy(null) done>=total / total=0 hidden
behaviors.evidence: existing campaignsApi.test.ts 'status is authoritative…', 'draft is hidden even with work remaining', 'legacy (status=null) falls back to done < total' — all re-verified green in the full suite

behaviors.behavior: END-TO-END: the rendered Campaigns lane omits a hidden campaign's card
behaviors.evidence: render wiring (TaskBoardPage `selectActiveCampaigns(data).length>0 && …map`) is unchanged by this diff and already browser-proven by campaign-status-filter.spec.ts; the active-done HIDDEN assertion was authored into that spec for the next seeded full-E2E pass

enumeration_basis.plus: BUG fix (Spec Impact NONE, no formal ACs) — basis = the 7 enumerated selector behaviors (the fix + 2 over-filter regressions + preserved states + isCampaignDone contract); E2E render behavior covered-by-existing-test
